memory_entries.text: SQLite product database schema: group g1 is primarily Office Products (items_g1/fdbk_g1/attrs_g1/taxn_g1), group g2 is Electronics (items_g2/fdbk_g2/taxn_g2), group g3 is Musical Instruments (items_g3/fdbk_g3/attrs_g3). For g3 Musical Instruments, items_g3.str_nm is blank; brand is stored in attrs_g3 where attr_key='Brand'. fdbk_g3.ts is populated as TEXT date YYYY-MM-DD, so review year is substr(ts,1,4).
